name: Impossible Hamburg Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine baking mix and water until soft dough forms; beat vigorously.
2. Spread dough into a ball on floured board.
3. Knead the dough 5 times.
4. Roll dough to be larger than 9 in pie plate. Place into plate with flute edges.
5. Brown ground beef and drain.
6. Stir in salt, oregano, pepper, onion, bread crumbs, and tomato sauce; spread in pie crust.
7. Beat egg and milk; stir in remaining ingredients.
8. Spread over beef mixture.
9. Bake until crust is golden, about 30 minutes at 375°F.
